description: Contains is a ProtoFlux node that returns the amount of times Search (String) occurs in Str (String) as a int.

fields.Str: The string to search for Search (String) in.
fields.Search: The string to be searching for.
fields.ComparisonMode: The search method to use when searching.
fields.* ([[Type:Int|int]]): The amount of times Search (String) occurs in Str (String).
